# grid.*: Create a new starting point

the `table.*` implementation has evolved quite a lot. at this point, the `grid.*` implementation can no longer easily get adjusted to be on feature parity.

so, since it would like to resume working on the grid, i will copy all the content over from table, adjust the names & ensure that we will keep using div tags.
